projects.name: AI Digest
projects.description: An AI industry digest that collects broad AI news, dedupes and ranks it in code, uses Gemini for editorial judgment and writing, publishes the full version on the website, and sends a twice-daily Telegram brief. The product should stay 80-90% industry digest and only 10-20% personal/workflow relevance.

digest_preferences.tone: human, thoughtful, direct, clear, not AI-ish
digest_preferences.telegram_style: long enough to understand the day without opening every source; no repeated stories; concrete workflow relevance only when real
avoid: making every story about my projects
repeating top stories inside smaller notes
overusing words like signal, ecosystem, landscape
